name: Honey Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Chicken wings, disjointed and tips discarded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Season chicken generously with pepper. Place wings in a large baking dish.
2. In a small bowl, mix together honey, soy sauce, oil, ketchup and garlic until well blended. Pour over chicken. Bake for 45 minutes, until chicken is thoroughly cooked and sauce has thickened.
